message:
test(sync,perf): add RU parser tests and relax hash perf threshold

- Add tests for parse_sync_output fallbacks (repo/name/path fields)
- Add test for unknown status defaulting to skipped
- Add test for invalid JSON error handling
- Relax hash_embedding CI threshold from 50μs to 100μs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
